results.title: Agentation
results.description: Agentation is a client-side React component that runs in the browser to generate structured feedback and annotations from DOM content, keeping all data local for development-only use.

results.title: Agent Protocol
results.description: The Agent Protocol is a standardized API specification for communicating with AI agents, enabling easier integration, comparison, and development of agent-based tools.

results.title: AgentMap
results.description: AgentMap is a declarative orchestration framework that transforms CSV files into LangGraph AI agent workflows, enabling the creation of multi-agent systems, conversational interfaces, and document processing pipelines with minimal code.

results.title: Agentica
results.description: Agentica is an AI function calling framework that simplifies AI agent development by allowing you to define agents using TypeScript classes, Swagger/OpenAPI documents, or MCP servers.

results.title: Agentic Data Analysis
results.description: An AI agent built in LangGraph that performs data analysis on a provided dataset, showcasing advanced LangGraph techniques.

results.title: agentUniverse
results.description: agentUniverse is a multi-agent framework based on large language models that enables building collaborative intelligent agents with flexible, extensible capabilities and domain-expert-level expertise.

results.title: Agents JSON
results.description: Agents JSON is an open specification built on OpenAPI to formally describe contracts for API and agent interactions, enabling AI agents to reliably interact with APIs.

results.title: Arklex
results.description: Build, deploy, and scale intelligent AI agents with enterprise-grade reliability using a model-agnostic, agent-first design for multi-agent orchestration.

results.title: Agentforce
results.description: Agentforce is the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform, enabling the deployment of AI agents that work alongside employees to extend the workforce, serve customers 24/7, and build trusted, customizable AI assistants.

results.title: Agentica
results.description: Agentica is a type-safe agent framework for building multi-agent LLM systems that integrate directly with code, functions, and SDKs, offering Python and TypeScript support.

results.title: OpenAgents
results.description: OpenAgents is an open-source foundational network infrastructure that enables AI Agents to connect, discover peers, and collaborate seamlessly in agent networks, supporting various protocols and a mod-driven architecture.

results.title: app.build Agent
results.description: app.build Agent is an open-source AI agent that generates production-ready applications with testing, linting, and deployment setup from a single prompt.

results.title: Dot Agent
results.description: A TypeScript library and CLI tool for parsing, validating, and discovering AI agent files with standardized YAML frontmatter metadata, featuring schema validation, agent discovery, and version management.

results.title: Browser-Agent
results.description: An AI agent for browser automation and web testing using Playwright, compliant with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

results.title: Edge Agents
results.description: Agentic Edge Functions combine serverless edge computing with autonomous AI capabilities, enabling distributed AI agents to operate near users with low latency and secure communication.

results.title: Agents.jl
results.description: Agents.jl is a pure Julia framework for agent-based modeling, offering a fast, simple, and feature-rich platform for simulations.

results.title: Archon
results.description: Archon is the first 'Agenteer', an AI agent designed to autonomously build, refine, and optimize other AI agents, serving as both a practical tool and an educational framework.

results.title: Functional Agent Framework
results.description: A purely functional AI agent framework built on immutable state, type safety, and composable policies, enabling production-ready AI agent systems with built-in security, observability, and error handling.

results.title: Agently
results.description: Agently is a Python framework designed to accelerate GenAI application development by providing an intuitive and efficient way to manage LLM outputs and integrate them with real-world applications.

results.title: AgentRouter
results.description: AgentRouter is an AI coding public service that provides free quotas to assist with AI coding and supports various tools like Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, and Gemini Cli.

results.title: Agent.ai
results.description: Agent.ai is a professional marketplace and no-code platform for discovering, building, and hiring AI agents to automate tasks using frontier LLMs and data integrations.

results.title: Agent Framework
results.description: Agent Framework is a tool to build robust, future-proof Agentic AI solutions that evolve with technological advancements.

results.title: Agent Skills
results.description: Agent Skills is a collection of domain-specific skills, prompts, and agent configurations designed to enhance AI coding agents with expertise in Microsoft AI SDKs and Azure services.

results.title: Agentset
results.description: Agentset is an open-source RAG-as-a-service platform that enables developers to build high-quality, agentic RAG applications with high accuracy and proper citations, simplifying infrastructure and processing large datasets.

results.title: AgentSociety
results.description: AgentSociety is a large-scale social simulator that uses LLM-driven agents to model complex urban scenarios and human behaviors, advancing social science research from first principles.

results.title: .agent
results.description: .agent is a top-level domain and ecosystem designed for AI agents, enabling secure recognition, interaction, and interoperability within a trusted network.

results.title: Agent Laboratory
results.description: Agent Laboratory is an end-to-end autonomous research workflow meant to assist you as the human researcher toward implementing your research ideas

results.title: AgentConnect
results.description: AgentConnect is an open-source implementation of the Agent Network Protocol (ANP), aiming to define how agents connect and collaborate securely and efficiently in the Agentic Internet era.

results.title: Agentgateway
results.description: Agentgateway is an open-source data plane for agentic AI connectivity, providing security, observability, and governance for agent-to-agent and agent-to-tool communication with support for interoperable protocols like A2A and MCP.

results.title: Agent Platform
results.description: Agent Platform is a universal platform by Just AI for creating, deploying, and managing autonomous AI agents, leveraging generative models to automate business processes and enhance customer communication.
